data.title: Cathie Wood Sells Palantir Shares As Rally Cools Down, Ark Invest Also Dumps Nearly $7 Million Worth Of Robinhood Stock
data.description: On Wednesday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made significant trades involving Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:PLTR) and Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ:HOOD).

data.title: Jensen Huang Once Wrote A Desperate Letter To Save Nvidia But Also Forged A Partnership Worth Billions With TSMC: Morris Chang Reveals The Story
data.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang once sent a desperate letter to TSMC founder Morris Chang in 1997, seeking a lifeline for his struggling company—a bold move that not only saved Nvidia from bankruptcy but also forged a multi-billion-dollar partnership that now powers the AI revolution.

data.title: Trump Administration Softens Gaza Takeover Proposal As Middle East Allies Reject Plan
data.description: Trump administration dialed back its Gaza proposal after global backlash. US not committing troops or funds. Proposal complicates peace talks.

data.title: $100 Invested In This Stock 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
FormFactor Stock Falls On Q4 Earnings Miss, Weak Guidance As 'Slow Demand' Continues In Q1
data.description: FormFactor shares are diving in extended trading Wednesday after the company reported fourth-quarter financial results that came up short of analyst expectations.
